cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, is this Sara Khan? Sir, I'm calling from Intellect Design Arena.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, this is Sara. Who's calling and how did you get my number, ji?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: I'm Rohan, the HR representative. We have your interview scheduled for tomorrow, and I just wanted to confirm your attendance, Achha?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Tomorrow? Yeah, I'm coming. But how did you get my number? I didn't give it to anyone at ICICI Bank or anywhere else.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: We must have gotten it from your application or maybe from a reference, madam. Anyway, you'll be meeting with Ms. Sharma tomorrow. Her number is 9876543210, in case you need to reach out.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Okay, got it. Ms. Sharma, 9876543210. But can I get a confirmation email or something? This call seems a bit... unusual, haan?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: I can definitely send you a confirmation email, Sara. Let me just check on that real quick. (pause) Yes, it's been sent. You should receive it shortly, Thik hai?

slow_thinking_rationale: At 69s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: An HR agent from [IT_COMPANY] calls a candidate a day before their scheduled interview to confirm their attendance and share the contact details of the person they should connect with.
